# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 5
              hour: 1000

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-route
        paths:
          - /products
        plugins:
          - name: request-size-limiting
            config:
              limit_by: body
              limit: 1m
              
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        plugins:
          - name: caching
            config:
              strategy: memory
              timeout: 300

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: '*'
      methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
      headers: Content-Type, Authorization
      exposed_headers: X-Example-Header
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
      preflight_continue: true
      
- name: jwt
  config:
    claims_to_verify:
      - exp
    key: your-public-key-here
    run_on_preflight: true
